summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned. Three security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling, five PRs are kept as non-mutating related or independent backlog items, and two PRs need specific maintainer judgment before any close or merge path.

actions.reason: Useful but not closeable or mergeable in this shard: it is a draft, has unresolved bot review findings, and needs stronger Windows real-behavior proof.
Independent maintainer-owned CI/security-scanner rollout. It is not a duplicate of the mixed inventory items and should stay open for normal maintainer review.
Secret-scanning remediation and write-capable alert handling are security-sensitive and out of ProjectClownfish backlog-cleanup scope.
Maintainer must choose or reconcile the overlapping /nodes docs PRs before closure or merge planning; this shard should not pick a canonical docs branch from compacted inventory alone.
Independent provider-usage feature/follow-up, not a duplicate or low-signal closeout. Keep open for maintainer review rather than closing or merging in plan mode.
The remaining decision is product/maintainer intent for subagent model precedence, not dedupe cleanup. Do not close or merge from this inventory shard.
Related session-state bugfix candidate with actionable proof and correctness gaps. Keep it open; no closure or merge recommendation is safe.
Provider-secret-related automation plus security-sensitive artifact marking requires central security handling; do not close, label, comment, merge, or fix through ProjectClownfish.
Credential/config secret handling is security-sensitive in this artifact. Route this exact PR and continue unrelated non-security classifications.
Related migration repair candidate with a real issue family and no closure basis. Keep open; do not supersede or merge from this plan shard.

needs_human: #92694: maintainer must choose or reconcile overlapping /nodes docs PRs before any closure or merge path.
